src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the LocalFileRAG class.
Remove the conditional property check to make the RAG service bean always available when missing, simplifying configuration.
Update import for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new package location in the service module.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.2.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
Configure Maven compiler and project properties to target Java 21.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
Upgrade Apache Tika to 3.2.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Upgrade Apache POI to 5.4.0 for compatibility and security fixes.
Upgrade Netty to 4.1.114.Final via BOM for security and stability.
Upgrade Commons Compress to 1.27.1 to fix CVE-2024-25710 and CVE-2024-26308.
Upgrade Commons Lang3 to 3.18.0 for latest features and bug fixes.
Upgrade BouncyCastle libraries to 1.79 to fix CVE-2025-8916.
Remove explicit PDFBox exclusions and dependencies as Tika 3.x handles PDF parsing internally.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 for better Java 21 support.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.2.5 for improved test execution.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to 3.6.3 and configure for Java 21.
Upgrade maven-source-plugin to 3.3.1.
Upgrade maven-jar-plugin to 3.3.0.
Upgrade maven-gpg-plugin to 3.2.4 for artifact signing.
Upgrade exec-maven-plugin to 3.4.1.
Add central-publishing-maven-plugin for publishing to Maven Central via Sonatype.
Configure Spring Boot plugin to generate a fat JAR with classifier to preserve standard JAR for publishing.
Update Ant plugin to copy the fat JAR (with classifier) to the release directory.
Add Windows profile to switch console encoding to GBK to prevent Chinese character garbling.
Add quick profile to skip GPG signing for faster local development builds.
Add developer, license, SCM, and distribution management metadata for Maven Central publishing.
Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.34.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore generated or large model files (Excel templates and ONNX models) from version control.
Ignore temporary META-INF folders created during JAR testing to keep the repository clean.
